source_command: manual observation captured during P0-3/P1/P2 release provenance closeout
summary: P0-3/P1/P2 closeout fixed release ZIP provenance, review snapshot hygiene, full-suite evidence refresh, operator blocker separation, the source-release versus live-auto-improve lane split, source package clean-extract testing, post-seal digest linkage, release ZIP atomic/quarantine handling, and runnable auto-improve queue recovery.

observations.problem: The closeout surfaced closure registries that needed artifact-envelope/currentness fields before generated artifact finalization could treat them as canonical current reports.
observations.why_it_matters: Manual envelope backfill is easy to miss during release evidence refresh and can make a clean code change fail late in artifact finalization.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a small closure-registry generator or canonical promotion target that stamps the shared artifact envelope and validates both closure registries before generated-artifact-index and artifact-freshness run.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-08: added ops.scripts.closure_registry_envelope, make closure-registry-envelope, generated-artifact-index prewiring, minimal-vault schema seeding, and focused regression coverage that fails if either closure registry lacks the shared envelope/currentness fields.

observations.problem: A ZIP self-description can only record evidence digests available at package-build time; final batch/self-check/operator artifacts are necessarily resealed after the ZIP exists.
observations.why_it_matters: Without an explicit phase, operators can mistake the ZIP's digest-only evidence list for the final post-seal authority and chase a non-actionable digest cycle.
observations.automation_candidate: Record the linkage phase and post-seal authority path in the self-description summary and assert those fields in release smoke tests.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated in this task and closed on 2026-05-08: release-archive-self-description records linkage_phase=pre_seal_package_build_snapshot and post_seal_authority=ops/reports/release-closeout-batch-manifest.json; release_post_seal_attestation now adds machine-readable pre_seal_post_seal_linkage with pre-seal observed digest, current post-seal digest, authoritative digest source, binding status, and drift status.

observations.surface: release risk taxonomy, closeout summary, lane summary, clean blocker ledger, operator release summary
observations.problem: The source release clean lane was over-coupled to live auto-improve execution readiness, so a non-runnable proposal queue could block packaging even when the source package evidence was otherwise clean.
observations.why_it_matters: Source release authority should protect package correctness and provenance, while live auto-improve readiness and learning claims need their own blocker lane with stricter non-signoff semantics.
observations.automation_candidate: Classify not-runnable auto-improve blockers as non-source clean lane blockers, keep them active in auto-improve and learning claim lanes, and surface the split in release summaries and ledger reports.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-08: release-risk-taxonomy no longer treats not-runnable execution blockers as source clean lane hard blockers; closeout, lane summary, clean blocker ledger, batch manifest, dashboard, operator summary, README text, and focused tests were updated together. Closed follow-up: mutation_proposal_runtime now emits a runnable recent_log_overlap_queue_blocked rotation proposal when every candidate is blocked only by recent_log_overlap, preserving diagnostics while restoring runnable queue readiness.

observations.surface: Makefile, ops/policies/source-package-test-deselections.json, source release ZIP clean extract
observations.problem: The profile matrix described source package expectations, but the repository did not expose a runnable Make target that built the source ZIP, extracted it cleanly, and ran only tests that do not require canonical generated evidence artifacts.
observations.why_it_matters: A source package can be correct while intentionally excluding ops/reports and ops/script-output-surfaces.json; without a dedicated lane, operators had to infer which tests were meaningful after extraction.
observations.automation_candidate: Add explicit source-package Make targets and a schema-backed deselection policy for tests that require generated evidence artifacts rather than source package contents.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-08: added make test-source-package, make release-source-package-check, SOURCE_PACKAGE_* variables, and ops/policies/source-package-test-deselections.json. Verified make test-source-package and make release-source-package-check pass, including clean extract ruff, mypy, and source-package pytest.

observations.problem: The release ZIP writer previously opened the final archive path directly, so a failed write or interrupted verification could leave a partial final archive at the authority path.
observations.why_it_matters: Release evidence should distinguish a verified, atomically replaced ZIP from a failed partial ZIP, and failures need a quarantine path for diagnosis without corrupting the final archive.
observations.automation_candidate: Write release ZIPs to a sibling temp path, verify testzip and self-description readback before atomic replace, and include quarantine metadata in partial reports when archive build fails.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-08: build_release_archive now writes a sibling temp ZIP, validates it, atomically replaces the final path, quarantines failed temp archives, and records archive_write metadata in partial release smoke reports.
